sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43864" key="eu)eti/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐετία</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐερμ-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.121.4</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Metrod.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
